expectations.evidence: Workflow A Step 4 + references/spec.md both mandate kebab-case. create_skill.py enforces via to_kebab() which converts underscores/spaces to hyphens and rejects capitals.

expectations.text: Drafts a description field with WHAT + WHEN
expectations.evidence: Workflow A Step 4 frontmatter rules explicitly require WHAT+WHEN. Scaffold stub includes inline [TODO] reminder in the description field.

expectations.text: Description includes at least one negative trigger
expectations.evidence: Both Workflow A Step 4 and spec.md mandate 'Do NOT use for...' in the description. Scaffold template includes this as a TODO.

expectations.text: Produces numbered, actionable step-by-step workflow instructions
expectations.evidence: Workflow A Step 4: 'Instructions with numbered, actionable steps (say what TO DO, not just what to know).' Scaffold template generates numbered Step 1/Step 2 stubs.
create_skill.py generates CHANGELOG.md automatically. Step 6 quality checklist (references/spec.md) includes CHANGELOG as a required housekeeping check.

expectations.text: Does NOT use underscores in the skill name or folder name
expectations.evidence: to_kebab() in create_skill.py: re.sub(r'[\s_]+', '-', name). Spec checklist item 1 is the underscore check.
